requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — SSB / EAS / EBS Requirements in Suriname
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——苏里南SSB / EAS / EBS要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——蘇里南SSB / EAS / EBS要求

summary.en: For solar PV inverters in Suriname, the applicable EMC standards under SSB's IEC adoption framework are IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase). IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment and covers conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, and harmonic distortion at the DC and AC interfaces. A critical consideration for Suriname is that IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 EMC tests conducted under 50 Hz grid conditions may not fully characterise EMC performance at 60 Hz. Harmonic emission profiles differ between 50 Hz and 60 Hz operating conditions because switching frequency harmonics interact differently with a 60 Hz fundamental. EMC evidence obtained under 50 Hz test conditions should be reviewed to determine whether 60 Hz retesting is required for the specific inverter model and power level.
summary.zh: 在苏里南，SSB IEC采纳框架下适用于太阳能光伏逆变器的EMC标准为IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流排放限值）。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，涵盖交直流接口处的传导和辐射排放、抗扰度及谐波失真。苏里南的关键考量是：在50 Hz电网条件下进行的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC测试，可能无法完整表征60 Hz下的EMC性能。50 Hz和60 Hz运行条件下的谐波排放特征存在差异，因为开关频率谐波与60 Hz基频的相互作用不同。在50 Hz测试条件下获得的EMC证据，应评估特定逆变器型号和功率等级是否需要在60 Hz下重新测试。
summary.zht: 在蘇里南，SSB IEC採納框架下適用於太陽能光伏逆變器的EMC標準為IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流排放限值）。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，涵蓋交直流介面處的傳導和輻射排放、抗擾度及諧波失真。蘇里南的關鍵考量是：在50 Hz電網條件下進行的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC測試，可能無法完整表徵60 Hz下的EMC性能。50 Hz和60 Hz運行條件下的諧波排放特徵存在差異，因為開關頻率諧波與60 Hz基頻的相互作用不同。在50 Hz測試條件下獲得的EMC證據，應評估特定逆變器型號和功率等級是否需要在60 Hz下重新測試。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (IEC standard adopted in SSB framework)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (IEC standard adopted in SSB framework)
SSB (Surinaams Standaarden Bureau) — IEC adoption framework for EMC standards

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories under 50 Hz / 220-380 V Chinese grid conditions. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods, GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for SSB/EAS/EBS requirements. A further frequency-specific issue applies: harmonic emission tests at 50 Hz grid conditions do not necessarily reflect the inverter's harmonic emission profile at 60 Hz — the 60 Hz fundamental shifts the harmonic spectrum relative to the inverter's switching frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网条件下，由CNAS认可的中国实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为SSB/EAS/EBS要求中IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合规证据。另一个频率特定问题：50 Hz电网条件下的谐波排放测试不一定反映逆变器在60 Hz下的谐波排放特征——60 Hz基频会相对逆变器开关频率移动谐波频谱。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網條件下，由CNAS認可的中國實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為SSB/EAS/EBS要求中IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合規證據。另一個頻率特定問題：50 Hz電網條件下的諧波排放測試不一定反映逆變器在60 Hz下的諧波排放特徵——60 Hz基頻會相對逆變器開關頻率移動諧波頻譜。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements at 50 Hz Chinese grid conditions; not accepted as IEC 62920 equivalent

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy SSB/EAS/EBS IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Suriname. Two gaps compound each other: (1) the standard gap — GB/T 37408 EMC is not harmonised with IEC 62920; (2) the frequency gap — EMC test results obtained at 50 Hz may not represent the inverter's harmonic emission profile at 60 Hz. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model, tested under 60 Hz operating conditions; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model at 60 Hz. Where only 50 Hz EMC test results exist, engage a qualified EMC engineer to assess whether retesting at 60 Hz is required given the inverter's switching topology and power rating.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足苏里南SSB/EAS/EBS的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。两个差距相互叠加：（1）标准差距——GB/T 37408 EMC未与IEC 62920协调；（2）频率差距——在50 Hz下获得的EMC测试结果可能无法代表逆变器在60 Hz下的谐波排放特征。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号且在60 Hz运行条件下测试的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号在60 Hz下的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。若仅有50 Hz EMC测试结果，应委托合格EMC工程师评估，根据逆变器的开关拓扑和功率等级判断是否需要在60 Hz下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足蘇里南SSB/EAS/EBS的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。兩個差距相互疊加：（1）標準差距——GB/T 37408 EMC未與IEC 62920協調；（2）頻率差距——在50 Hz下獲得的EMC測試結果可能無法代表逆變器在60 Hz下的諧波排放特徵。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號且在60 Hz運行條件下測試的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號在60 Hz下的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。若僅有50 Hz EMC測試結果，應委託合格EMC工程師評估，根據逆變器的開關拓撲和功率等級判斷是否需要在60 Hz下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 EMC evidence are the expected technical baseline under SSB's IEC adoption framework and EBS interconnection review for PV inverters in Suriname; formal mandatory enforcement status should be confirmed with SSB and EAS directly
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a component of voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: Surinaams Standaarden Bureau (SSB) — Suriname Standards Bureau

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy SSB/EAS/EBS IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Suriname. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, tested under 60 Hz grid conditions, before project submission or EBS interconnection review. Assess whether existing 50 Hz EMC test reports adequately characterise 60 Hz harmonic emission performance for the specific inverter model — retesting at 60 Hz may be required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足苏里南SSB/EAS/EBS的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在项目提交或EBS互联审查前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得在60 Hz电网条件下测试的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请评估现有50 Hz EMC测试报告是否能充分表征特定逆变器型号的60 Hz谐波排放性能——可能需要在60 Hz下重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足蘇里南SSB/EAS/EBS的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在項目提交或EBS互聯審查前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得在60 Hz電網條件下測試的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請評估現有50 Hz EMC測試報告是否能充分表徵特定逆變器型號的60 Hz諧波排放性能——可能需要在60 Hz下重新測試。
